description_long: This is a medium-sized, six-wheeled flatbed truck with a utilitarian design, featuring a single cab at the front and a large, open cargo bed with metal side panels. The cab is painted white and has two side mirrors, a visible exhaust stack, and two seats inside. The cargo bed is bordered by greenish-blue metal panels with a weathered, industrial appearance, and the floor of the bed is made of wood or a wood-like material. The truck has three axles, with two sets of double rear wheels for heavy load support, and the tires are rugged, suitable for urban and light off-road use. The front grille is simple, with headlights and a license plate, but no clear manufacturer logo is visible. This vehicle is commonly used for transporting goods, materials, or equipment in urban environments.
description: A six-wheeled flatbed truck with a white cab and greenish-blue metal cargo bed, designed for transporting goods in urban settings. The truck features a single cab, rugged tires, and a large open cargo area.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the truck, the white cab, and the open flatbed with greenish-blue metal panels.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the white cab, windshield, two seats, side mirrors, and the front grille.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the cab, exhaust stack, and the full cargo bed with metal side panels.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the open cargo bed, rear metal panel, and the back of the cab.
